proxy_metric: mean flow magnitude in tissue ROI (px/frame)
clinical_note: Force proxy is a visual estimate only. Real surgical robots require calibrated force sensors for safety-critical force limits. This proxy is suitable for monitoring and logging, not hard safety stops.
calibration_note: Threshold calibrated from 10 episodes of Phase 3B agent. Agent mean flow=0.128 px/frame, std=0.114, max=0.732. Threshold set at mean+2std=0.356 px/frame. No collision steps observed — agent learned safe tissue interaction. For Phase 4 ROS2: values above 0.35 trigger monitoring alert, values above 1.0 trigger safety stop.
